topQuestionCandidates.content: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
Is it actually better to have two computer screens or is one big screen enough for most people?

smartTalkSample.content: Why do all websites look exactly the same now with massive text and boring colors?

Is Notion actually better than just using a simple notebook? I feel like learning it is a full-time job.
